games.name: Test Game
games.description: A minimal test game for validating the content system

games.name: Marvel Champions
games.description: A cooperative Living Card Game where players take on the roles of Marvel heroes to thwart the schemes of villains.

games.name: Arkham Horror LCG
games.description: A cooperative Living Card Game set in H.P. Lovecraft's horrifying world of the Cthulhu Mythos.

games.name: Keyforge
games.description: A unique deck game where every deck is one-of-a-kind, as you race to forge keys and unlock the Vaults of the Crucible.

games.name: Star Wars: Unlimited
games.description: A strategic two-player card game set in the Star Wars universe, where iconic characters and ships clash across the galaxy.

games.name: Lord of the Rings LCG
games.description: A cooperative Living Card Game where players build decks from Middle-earth's greatest heroes to survive epic quests.
